notes:
EX-era set (EX Crystal Guardians, code CG, English release 2006-08-30, 100 cards). Config file written to /Users/alexandreott/Desktop/POKÉ EV/data/pull-rates/ex-crystal-guardians.json, validated (every slot sums to exactly 1.0, all distribution keys are a strict subset of the given buckets {rare-holo, rare, uncommon, common, ex, gold-star}, slot counts total to packSize 9). Matches the existing ex-firered-leafgreen.json precedent in this dataset.

BOOSTER STRUCTURE: 9 cards/pack (Bulbapedia Booster-pack page: 'Beginning with the e-Card Series and continuing through the entirety of the EX Series, boosters had only 9 cards'; every pack guaranteed >=1 Rare, ~3 Uncommon, remainder Common, plus 1 Reverse-Holo since Legendary Collection). Modeled as 5 common + 2 uncommon + 1 reverse-holo + 1 rare-or-better. Booster box = 36 packs (DA Card World 'Vintage Gold Stars' box listing). NO ETB existed in this era -> etbPacks=null. Display = 36-pack box.

RARE-OR-BETTER SLOT resolves across {rare, rare-holo, ex, gold-star}:
- gold-star = 0.014 (~1:72 packs = ~1 per 2 boxes, the 2 Gold Stars Alakazam Star 99 + Celebi Star 100 combined). Flipside Gaming: 'Gold Star cards ... approximately 1:72 packs (2 booster boxes)'; Kanto Shark: 'roughly 1 per 72 packs'. 1/72=0.0139.
- ex = 0.083 (~1:12 packs, ~3 ex/box). Flipside sources the EX-era ex band (Pokebeach/Pokegym) from 1:36 (Holon Phantoms, scarce) to 1:8-12 (ex Power Keepers, generous). CG is an ex-heavy mid-era set (10 ex in catalog / 11 per Bulbapedia) so placed at the generous middle ~1:12, identical to the FRLG precedent.
- rare-holo = 0.333 (~1:3 packs era-convention holo rate; consistent with elitefourum 12-pack sample of 7 holo/ex pulls).
- rare = remainder = 1 - 0.014 - 0.083 - 0.333 = 0.570 (plain non-holo rare).

REVERSE-HOLO SLOT modeled with plain common/uncommon ids per dataset convention; CG pools near-equal (common:29/uncommon:30) -> neutral 50/50 split.

BUCKET MAPPING: Bulbapedia CG rarity breakdown = 21 Common, 13 Uncommon, 13 Rare, 13 Rare Holo, 11 Rare Holo ex, 2 Gold Star. Hit buckets driving EV match the catalog closely: rare-holo:13 = exact, ex:10 ~ Bulbapedia 11 (classifier splits one ex off), gold-star:2 = exact.

CONFIDENCE 'low': no per-set published pull-rate STUDY; ex/gold-star/holo rates are EX-era community/retailer averages (Flipside aggregating Pokebeach/Pokegym + Kanto Shark + Bulbapedia pack structure + small elitefourum sample) mapped onto CG. Vintage sealed 'Gold Stars' boxes carry a heavy collector premium so EV/booster will sit far below sealed box price -- expected, rates NOT inflated to compensate.
